extraction.one_line_summary: SKELMOSE Mattias attacked solo in final 10km on undulating terrain, sustaining 30+ second gap to burned-out chasers for win
tactical_patterns: Lidl-Trek placed two riders (SKELMOSE, SQUINZ) in 5-man decisive break, used SQUINZ's counter-attacks to isolate rivals before SKELMOSE's final move
Race selection happened far earlier than 2022's 40km decisive break, with constant surges preventing cohesive chase organization
SKELMOSE's late attack on minor incline worked because rivals already burned matches countering earlier SQUINZ accelerations

rider_signals.SKELMOSE Mattias: positive: Won despite being dropped multiple times earlier, superior recovery compared to break companions
rider_signals.SQUINZ Tom: positive: Executed perfect domestique work counter-attacking repeatedly to isolate teammate SKELMOSE for final move
rider_signals.POWERS Nielsen: negative: Faded badly in final kilometers after burning matches bridging, suggesting poor pacing discipline
rider_signals.HAMILTON Lucas: negative: Unable to cover SKELMOSE's final acceleration despite Jayco having two riders (HARPER, HAMILTON) in break
